news.t: GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs
GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs.

GraniteShares Announces Weekly Distributions for its YieldBOOST ETFs: COYY, TSYY, NVYY, XBTY, AMYY, TQQY, AZYY, YSPY, MTYY, PLYY, HOYY, SMYY, BBYY, FBYY, IOYY, MAAY, NUGY, SEMY, QBY, RGYY, HMYY, RTYY, MUYY, TMYY, CWY, CRY and 20+ Others

holdings.infoBox: SMYY is an equity ETF with a total of 10 individual holdings.

overview.description: The GraniteShares YieldBOOST SMCI ETF (SMYY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in information technology equity. The fund is actively managed seeking current income and the daily 2x leverage of the price performance of Super Micro Computer Inc. (NASDAQ: SMCI) SMYY was launched on Sep 30, 2025 and is issued by GraniteShares.
